title: YAGE 26 Letter Christmas Tree Decoration, Personalised Christmas Tree Letters Hanging Ornaments, for DIY Crafts Decorations, Home Party Festival Decor (P)
features: 🎄 Personalised Christmas Decor: This includes individual English alphabet letters, allowing you to creatively spell names, words, or festive messages on your Christmas tree, making your holiday decor unique and meaningful

✨ Versatile Festive Decoration: Perfect not only for Christmas trees but also for holiday weddings, home parties, wall mounting, and DIY craft projects. Use them to add a festive touch to your home, classroom, or office decor

🎅 High-Quality & Durable: Made from clear plastic, these 3-inch baubles are lightweight yet sturdy. They feature a smooth finish and come with easy-to-hang strings, ensuring they look beautiful and last for many Christmas seasons

🎁 Fun DIY Craft Activity: An engaging family activity! Children and adults can enjoy crafting together by decorating the tree with their favourite names or words. It's an excellent way to create lasting memories during the Christmas festival

❤️ Ideal Christmas Gift: Beautifully packaged, You can freely choose the letters you want, making it a thoughtful and practical gift for friends, family, or craft enthusiasts. It's a perfect gift for spreading Christmas cheer and inspiring creativity
